payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, read-only SELECT queries are permitted, such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`, while destructive operations like `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied.
citations: Input fixture: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a transient system capability/constraint, not a durable personal fact suitable for memory storage.

payload.intent: Explain the configured SQL permissions in admin select-only mode.

details: Parsed the permission boundary from the input.
Did not store any durable memory.

repair_options: Do not attempt DELETE in select-only mode.
If deletion is required, switch to a mode or account with write/delete privileges.
